use_cases: Side navigation menus for mobile and desktop applications
Product filter panels in e-commerce storefronts
Multi-step form wizards with collapsible sections
Confirmation dialogs with detailed information display
ai_summary: A versatile side drawer component built with Base UI primitives and styled with Tailwind CSS using CVA variants. Features context-based state management for nested interactive elements including checkboxes and radio groups. Designed for general-purpose overlay use cases like navigation menus, filter panels, and settings screens across SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
